privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on purely synthetic data constructed directly via bash and Python scripts. The technical rider parameters injected into the environment strictly correspond to the metadata claims. Specifically, the input tracks (7 items including 'Kick Drum' and 'Piano Left'), bus tracks ('Drum Sub', 'Piano Sub'), pan positions (e.g., 0.15 for 35% left), and bus gain (-6 dB) exactly match task descriptions and verifier logic. I additionally validated the sample-based set list markers by manually multiplying the 44100 Hz sample rate against minute counts, confirming all values exactly match expectations (e.g., 5 min * 60 * 44100 = 13230000 samples).
